title: Review Report
description: Structured output from the review skill. Must be valid JSON parseable by JSON.parse().

success.description: true if there are no unfixed blocker issues remaining, false if unfixed blockers exist

review_summary.description: 2-4 sentences describing what was reviewed, issues found, and what was fixed.
examples: Reviewed auth implementation against specs/feat-user-auth.md. Found 2 issues: a missing auth check on /admin (blocker) and a hardcoded session timeout (tech_debt). Both were fixed in-place. All spec requirements are now met.

issues_found.description: Total number of issues discovered during review

issues_fixed.description: Number of issues that were successfully fixed

screenshot_path.description: Absolute path to a screenshot showing the issue. Only required for UI issues.

issue_description.description: Clear description of what the issue is and how it deviates from the spec

issue_resolution.description: What was done to fix the issue, or recommended action if not fixed

issue_severity.description: Impact classification per the severity guide

fixed.description: true if the issue was fixed in-place, false if it remains (skippable issues are always false)

fix_note.description: Optional note explaining why a blocker or tech_debt issue was not fixed, or details about the fix applied

items.description: Absolute path to a screenshot showcasing implemented functionality

screenshots.description: Always include screenshots when UI review was performed, regardless of success status
